category_sources: Official Cucumber docs describe Cucumber-Ruby as the Ruby gem implementation of Cucumber.
display_name_sources: Official Cucumber installation docs title the page Cucumber-Ruby.
docs_sources: Official Cucumber docs provide broader Cucumber usage documentation.
Official Cucumber documentation has a dedicated Cucumber-Ruby installation page.
Official GitHub README documents the Ruby implementation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cucumber/cucumber-ruby; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Cucumber docs describe Cucumber as a tool for tests written in plain language.
